PluginData.Author: Voxar
PluginData.Tooltip: Render plugin for the Adjustable LCD Mirror and Camera Views mod
PluginData.Description:
Renders Mirror and Camera views for the "Adjustable LCD Mirror and Camera Views" mod.
The so far required mod manages the LCD apps, configurations, toolbar actions, properties and MP sync. https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3733546359
Mod source at https://github.com/voxar/SE-Mirror-Mod
